criteria.definition: Identifies the root cause: the test imports sum from ../src/utils/math, but the agent edited the OTHER sum in src/math.ts the whole time, so its edits never affected the function under test (NaN persists, console.log never prints).
Cites the pinning evidence: the test import line (../src/utils/math), the grep showing two sum definitions, and the never-printing console.log.
<= 12 lines, no rambling, no long proposed fix — just cause and evidence.
